APIs for creating and managing orchestrations that automate business processes and integrate with external systems. Developers visually build orchestrations using the Orchestration Builder to define flows, map data, and perform transformations. Orchestrations can be triggered from Extend apps, business processes, integration systems, or external systems via API triggers.
